reviews.review_description:
I gifted it to one of my friends and he said it’s one of the best target practices ever and I just bought it for myself and tried it out. It is super fun and I had to write a review since there’s none so if anyone’s looking at this, I would buy it and it’s so cheap. It’s so worth it ￼.. 

update I think you guys should add a city map 
￼ and add different paintball guns instead of just pistols ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the game and even gifted it to your friend. It's great to know that we've been able to provide such a fun and effective target practice experience. Your support means the world to us, and we're always working to improve and bring an even better experience. We hope the game continues to create more enjoyable moments for you and your friends. :)
